# Load the provided JSON files and search for candidates related to the user's span.
import json, re, unicodedata, itertools, math, os, sys, textwrap

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

len(quran), len(hadith)

# Define normalization functions
import re

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]")
tatweel = re.compile(r"\u0640")
punct = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]")

def normalize(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    s = s.strip()
    s = tatweel.sub("", s)
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # unify hamza forms
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه")
    s = punct.sub(" ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s)
    return s

provided_full = "دعا نوح لقومه 950 سنة، فلما فرغ منها قال: «يَا قَوْمِ، لَئِن لَمْ تُفْعَلْ لَكُمُ مِنَ اللَهِ مِنَ الرِزْقِ، فَاِشَاعُ النَاسَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْأَرْضِ"
provided_snippet = "دعا نوح لق... الْأَرْضِ"

norm_full = normalize(provided_full)
norm_full

# Inspect some "فلما فرغ" hits to see if any relate to Nuh context (unlikely but check)

hadith_hits_sample

# Try broader search for "نوح" hadith, to see any matn mentioning his duration or 950 years
nooh_all = []
for rec in hadith:
    text = rec.get("hadithTxt") or rec.get("Matn") or ""
    if not text: continue
    if "نوح" in text:
        nooh_all.append(text)
len(nooh_all)

# Check if any of those contain numbers or "ألف سنة" or "خمسين"
candidates = [t for t in nooh_all if any(x in t for x in ["ألف", "خمسين", "950", "تسعمائة", "سنة"])]
len(candidates), candidates[:20]

# Retrieve the exact ayah text string programmatically to ensure exact match
target_norm = normalize("وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِ فَلَبِثَ فِيهِمْ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ إِلَّا خَمْسِينَ عَامًا فَأَخَذَهُمُ الطُّوفَانُ وَهُمْ ظَالِمُونَ")
exact_ayahs = []
for rec in quran:
    text = rec.get("ayah_text","")
    if normalize(text) == target_norm:
        exact_ayahs.append(text)
len(exact_ayahs), exact_ayahs[:1]
